description: Style NoteHide edge comes up with this item du jour - just right to add a new season twist to your off-duty wardrobe. Style this belt with tonal shoes (no sports shoes please!) to get the look just right.Product DetailsBlack textured belt with a tang claspHas holes to customise the Fit and a fixed loop near the buckleMaterial and careLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
